kind: DOCUMENTATION — methodology-spec extraction from completed sibling cycles
@methodology_self_application_note: This cycle itself applies MT1 (carry_forward_origin to the audit cycle, no retroactive edit of any audited witness) and exhibits #9-shape-PROVISIONAL (sweep prior witnesses, classify per-pattern, selectively codify, anti-paint-over via PROVISIONAL_PATTERN gating).
scope_boundary: Documentation only — extract 4 patterns (2 META-Tier-1 CANONICAL, 2 PROVISIONAL) from 5 audited witnesses. NO code changes; NO retroactive witness edits; NO atlas.signals/millennium edits. Produces .md spec + this .json witness.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-pattern-has-canonical-shape-extracted
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: spec contains, for each of the 4 patterns: when-to-use + canonical structure (numbered steps) + anti-patterns + recommended @methodology field
falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: spec at state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md has 4 sections (MT1, MT2, #9-shape, #7-shape) each with 'When to apply', 'Canonical structure' (numbered 1-N), 'Anti-patterns (real failure modes)', 'Recommended @methodology(<id>) field' subsections

falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-pattern-has-2-plus-exemplar-citations-with-paths
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: every CANONICAL pattern cites 2+ exemplar witnesses with absolute file paths; PROVISIONAL_PATTERN may cite fewer with explicit PROVISIONAL_PATTERN tag
falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: MT1: 2 exemplars (#1 producer + #7 downstream). MT2: 3 exemplars (#2 intro + #3 + #7 honoring). #9-shape: 2 instances cited (#9 + meta-audit-of-cycles) — flagged PROVISIONAL because the meta-instance is at a different tier. #7-shape: 2 exemplars (#7 + #11) — flagged PROVISIONAL because the audit characterized this as a 2-cycle pattern. All paths absolute under /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick/.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: anti-patterns-identified-not-fabricated
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: every pattern's anti-pattern list cites concrete failure modes grounded in either (a) the audit's findings or (b) directly inverted from the canonical structure (not invented hypotheticals)
falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: MT1 anti-patterns: 'retroactive paint-over' (audit explicitly forbade this in cycles_requiring_re_fire reasoning); 'silent fix without crediting' (inverse of MT1's tier-1 promotion requirement); 'demoting producer's tier-1' (inverse of audit's #1 KEEP recommendation). MT2 anti-patterns: 'PASS-by-assertion' (audit's paint_over_emergence_per_cycle scanned for this); 'inflated falsifier_pass_count' (concretely the field that distinguishes ACKNOWLEDGED from PASS). #9-shape: 'sweep-without-classify' (the actual gold-standard files audit specifically called out); 'fix-without-regress' (concrete: #9 ran kick_bench_freshness_smoke 7/7). #7-shape: 'paint-over-by-association' (audit's synthetic_only_labeled_as_live_check scanned for this).

falsifiers_preregistered.name: adoption-proposal-justified-with-pros-cons
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: spec contains explicit YES/NO proposal for @methodology(<id>) field with at least 3 pros and 2 cons + mitigation
falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: Spec section 'Adoption proposal: @methodology(<id>) tag in future witnesses' has 5 pros (machine-discoverability, citation chain, promotion gating, onboarding, lint enforceability), 3 cons (bureaucratic inflation, tag drift, false precision), and 3-rule mitigation policy.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: spec-cross-references-existing-witnesses-verbatim
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: every exemplar citation includes the exact filename + a verbatim field/value from the witness (not paraphrase)
falsifiers_preregistered.evidence: Spec MT1 exemplar #7 cites field 'secondary_finding_macos_time_source_bug' verbatim and tier_1_promotions[].id 'tier1-macos-time-source-fallback-cascade' verbatim. MT2 exemplar #2 cites F6 'live-spawn-still-out-of-scope' verdict 'ACKNOWLEDGED' and falsifier_acknowledged_count: 1 verbatim. #9-shape cites sites_audit sub-buckets (fixed_silent_bypass_with_cascade, already_safe_no_action, unfixable_or_no_impact_excluded) verbatim. #7-shape cites tool/kick_bench_freshness_smoke.hexa source-line range 488-496 verbatim from the production code.

axes_2_fanout.rationale: Extract canonical structure per pattern (when-to-use / structure / anti-patterns / @methodology tag). Operates on prose synthesis from prior witnesses' tier_1_promotions[] and falsifiers[] blocks.

Cite 2+ verbatim exemplars per pattern with absolute paths. Operates on file-finding + verbatim-field-extraction. Independent from distillation: distillation could fabricate without citation, citation could enumerate without distillation. Correlation estimated 0.4.

axes_correlation_check: pattern-distillation (synthesis of canonical structure from prose tier_1 fields) vs exemplar-citation (verbatim field/path extraction from concrete witnesses). Independent: a spec could distill structure without citing exemplars (would fail F5) or could cite exemplars without distilling structure (would fail F1). Correlation ~0.4 < 0.7.

adoption_proposal.rationale_summary: Tag enables machine-discoverable citation chains, supports PROVISIONAL → CANONICAL graduation gating, and reduces witness verbosity. 3-rule policy (only-tag-when-actually-conforms / PROVISIONAL-suffix / weekly-conformance-audit) prevents cargo-cult tagging.

honesty_preservation.evidence: Read-only access to all 5 exemplar witnesses; no writes to design/kick/2026-04-27_*_omega_cycle.json other than this NEW file at landing_path. Producer witnesses (#1, #2, #9 etc.) untouched per MT1's own canonical structure (which this cycle itself applies).
honesty_preservation.evidence_no_fab: All 4 patterns named in audit's meta_tier_1_promotions[] and cycles_warranting_promotion[]. No new pattern invented — pure codification of patterns already explicitly identified by the audit.
honesty_preservation.evidence_no_inflate: #9-shape and #7-shape correctly marked PROVISIONAL_PATTERN per the kick brief's instruction ('if a pattern has only 1 exemplar (not 2+), document it as PROVISIONAL_PATTERN not canonical'). Both have 2 exemplars but are marked PROVISIONAL because the second exemplar is at a different tier (#9-shape: meta-audit instance) or because the audit explicitly characterized as a 2-cycle pattern (#7-shape) — honest non-inflation.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: Codified 4 ω-cycle methodology patterns (2 CANONICAL MT1/MT2, 2 PROVISIONAL #9-shape/#7-shape) from the 2026-04-27 quality-audit cycle's promotions, with: per-pattern canonical structure (when/structure/anti/tag), 9 verbatim exemplar citations with absolute paths, 14 concrete anti-patterns grounded in audit findings, adoption proposal with pros/cons/mitigation. Spec lands at state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md. Pattern reusable: any future quality-audit cycle that surfaces meta-Tier-1 promotions can fire a sibling codification cycle to materialize them as machine-citeable methodology entries.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md sections MT1/MT2/#9-shape/#7-shape; cross-references summary table; carry-forward 4-step rollout plan.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: Proposed @methodology(<id>) field for future witnesses with 3-rule policy (only-when-conforms / PROVISIONAL-suffix / weekly-audit). Enables machine-discoverable citation chains for patterns that previously required manual prose recognition. This witness self-applies the proposal (@methodology: ['MT1', '#9-shape-PROVISIONAL']) as proof-of-concept — first witness in the corpus to carry the tag.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: spec 'Adoption proposal' section; this witness root-level @methodology field; @methodology_self_application_note explaining the self-application.

raw_compliance.raw_8_hexa_only: honored — only this .json witness + 1 .md spec emitted; no .py/.sh/.rs/.toml created (DOCUMENTATION cycle)

atlas_protection.evidence: Read-only access to 5 prior witness files + 1 audit witness; only NEW writes are state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md and this witness JSON.

carry_forward: Adoption rollout: retro-tag the 11 audited cycles with @methodology arrays per the 3-rule policy (1 ω-cycle, no code changes)
Lint design: scope a @methodology-conformance-lint.hexa tool that scans design/kick/*.json and reports tag/structure mismatches (e.g. verdict='ACKNOWLEDGED' without @methodology=['MT2']) (1 ω-cycle)
PROVISIONAL → CANONICAL gating: after 1 additional independent application of #9-shape and #7-shape, promote to CANONICAL via a quality-audit cycle

Hive raw promotion: if these patterns survive 4+ weeks of use, propose them as hive raw-N entries (raw 81: ACKNOWLEDGED-verdict for scope falsifiers; raw 82: chained-verification origin field; raw 83: synthetic-harness 3-requirement contract)
headline: 4 ω-cycle methodology patterns codified from 2026-04-27 quality-audit promotions: MT1 honest-chained-verification (CANONICAL), MT2 scope-statement-falsifier-via-ACKNOWLEDGED-verdict (CANONICAL), #9-shape audit-cycle-canonical-shape (PROVISIONAL), #7-shape synthetic-harness-as-honest-substitute (PROVISIONAL). 9 verbatim exemplar citations with absolute paths. 14 concrete anti-patterns. Adoption proposal: YES @methodology(<id>) tag with 3-rule policy. This witness self-applies the proposal as proof-of-concept. NO code changes; NO retroactive witness edits.
